creator: olivier@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Denis Shaposhnikov from comment #15)

Hi Denis,
Indeed I’ve forgot to test it on non -head FreeBSD !

So I need to understand what happen here because this variable daylight seems define by the include time.h.
But time.h export only if inside a __XSI_VISIBLE condition, so my feeling is there is a behaviour changes here I need to fix.
